"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as SwitchPrimitives from "@radix-ui/react-switch"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const switchSwitchPrimitivesThumb = tw.style({
    pointerEvents: "pointer-events-none",
    display: "block",
    height: "h-4",
    width: "w-4",
    borderRadius: "rounded-full",
    backgroundColor: "bg-background",
    boxShadow: ["shadow-lg", "ring-0"],
    transitionProperty: "transition-transform",
    "data-[state=checked]": {
        translate: "data-[state=checked]:translate-x-4",
    },
    "data-[state=unchecked]": {
        translate: "data-[state=unchecked]:translate-x-0",
    },
});

const switchSwitchPrimitivesRoot = tw.style({
    display: "inline-flex",
    height: "h-5",
    width: "w-9",
    flexShrink: "shrink-0",
    cursor: "cursor-pointer",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    borderRadius: "rounded-full",
    borderWidth: "border-2",
    borderColor: "border-transparent",
    boxShadow: "shadow-sm",
    transitionProperty: "transition-colors",
    "focus-visible": {
        outlineStyle: "focus-visible:outline-none",
        boxShadow: ["focus-visible:ring-2", "focus-visible:ring-ring", "focus-visible:ring-offset-2", "focus-visible:ring-offset-background"],
    },
    disabled: {
        cursor: "disabled:cursor-not-allowed",
        opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
    },
    "data-[state=checked]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[state=checked]:bg-primary",
    },
    "data-[state=unchecked]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[state=unchecked]:bg-input",
    },
});

const Switch = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SwitchPrimitives.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SwitchPrimitives.Root>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SwitchPrimitives.Root
    className={tw.join(switchSwitchPrimitivesRoot.class(), className)}
    {...props}
    ref={ref}
  >
    <SwitchPrimitives.Thumb
      className={switchSwitchPrimitivesThumb.class()}
    />
  </SwitchPrimitives.Root>
))
Switch.displayName = SwitchPrimitives.Root.displayName

export { Switch }
